docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-12-2022 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/RESPONDENT RONALD KEMPTON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. Petition For Release Of Property From Claim Of Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Simon Mazzila, 650.403.4802 of The Law Office of Simon Mazzila appearing via Zoom for Petioner Kara Morrison.
Ronlad Kempton, Respondent,no phone number provided appearing appearing viz Zoom on his own behalf.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER KARA MORRISON'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANICS LIEN is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
